title: BEM-740 verify runtime
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/handoff']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 15:27 (UTC+3)'

def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists(): return {}
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore'))
    except: return {}
watch=load('governance/state/claude_mailbox_minute_watchdog_state.json')
runtime=load('governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json')
lint=load('governance/state/workflow_lint_gate_state.json')
checks=watch.get('checks',[]) if isinstance(watch.get('checks',[]),list) else []
runs=runtime.get('runs',[]) if isinstance(runtime.get('runs',[]),list) else []
responses=[]
for d in [Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt'),Path('governance/audit_mailbox/external_auditor_to_internal_auditor')]:
    if d.exists():
        for p in sorted(d.glob('*')):
            if p.is_file():
                txt=p.read_text(errors='ignore')
                low=(p.name+' '+txt).lower(); up=txt.upper()
                if 'bem732' in low or 'bem-732' in low or 'bem728' in low or 'bem-728' in low or 'bem725' in low or 'bem-725' in low or 'multi-agent strategy' in low:
                    decision='MESSAGE'
                    if 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up: decision='CHANGE_REQUIRED'
                    elif 'BLOCKED' in up: decision='BLOCKED'
                    elif 'APPROVED' in up or 'DECISION: APPROVE' in up: decision='APPROVED'
                    responses.append({'path':str(p),'decision':decision})
runtime_proven=bool(runtime.get('started_at') or runtime.get('completed_at') or runs)
if responses:
    status='claude_response_found'
    blocker=None
elif runtime_proven:
    status='claude_runtime_proven_waiting_response_or_outcome'
    blocker={'code':'CLAUDE_RUNTIME_PROVEN_NO_RESPONSE_FILE_YET','runtime_latest':runtime.get('latest')}
else:
    status='claude_runtime_not_proven_after_bridge'
    blocker={'code':'CLAUDE_RUNTIME_NOT_PROVEN_AFTER_BRIDGE','message':'Lint repair completed and bridge exists, but no runtime state is visible yet. Need trigger a fresh inbox item after repaired workflow.'}
state={'schema_version':'verify_lint_repair_and_claude_runtime_after_bridge.v1','bem':'BEM-740','status':status,'workflow_lint_state':lint,'watchdog_check_count':len(checks),'watchdog_last_checked_at':watch.get('checked_at'),'watchdog_latest_status':watch.get('status'),'claude_runtime_state_exists':bool(runtime),'claude_runtime_runs':runs,'claude_runtime_started_at':runtime.get('started_at'),'claude_runtime_completed_at':runtime.get('completed_at'),'claude_action_outcome':runtime.get('claude_action_outcome'),'responses_found':len(responses),'responses':responses,'operator_role':'none','blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem740_verify_lint_repair_and_claude_runtime_after_bridge.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem740_verify_lint_repair_and_claude_runtime_after_bridge.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-740 | Verify Lint Repair And Claude Runtime After Bridge | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Lint state: '+str(lint.get('status'))+sep+'Watchdog checks: '+str(len(checks))+sep+'Claude runtime started: '+str(runtime.get('started_at'))+sep+'Claude runtime completed: '+str(runtime.get('completed_at'))+sep+'Responses found: '+str(len(responses))+sep+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem740_verify_lint_repair_and_claude_runtime_after_bridge','status':status,'lint_status':lint.get('status'),'watchdog_check_count':len(checks),'runtime_started':runtime.get('started_at'),'responses_found':len(responses),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem740_verify_lint_repair_and_claude_runtime_after_bridge.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-740 '+status+' responses_found='+str(len(responses))+' runtime_runs='+str(len(runs))+'\n')
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | CONTINUE CLAUDE RUNTIME LOOP'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: if runtime not proven, send fresh inbox trigger after repaired workflow.'+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof),'governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md'])
ops_applied.append('Verified lint repair state, watchdog tick count, Claude runtime state and response files after bridge repair')
"""
No issue comments.
